docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, ENRIQUE AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN, PEBBLES GREEN, RICK DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, ENRIQUE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR NOV-15-2000 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON NOV-20-2000 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

PRO TEM SIDNEY BERENSTEIN, CLERK-BETH WILBER: C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. MR. JONATHAN BORNSTEIN APPEARING FOR PLTF, MR. JUNJI SUZUKI APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS. CASE SETTLED BUT TERMS WERE NOT PUT ON THE RECORD, SEE MINUTES FOR DETAILS. PARTIES FILED A JUDGEMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: SUZUKI, JUNJI SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR GREEN, RICK

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREEN, PEBBLES GREEN, RICK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 226 IRVING ST, #1Y $4,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,000.00, LEASE FORFEITED, PLFT. ALSO TO AWARDED ATTY FEES AND COSTS; IF DEFT'S COMPLY WITH TERMS PLTF. WILL DISM. W/PREJ. ANY AND ALL COMPLAINTS; SEE JUDGMENT IN FILE FOR PAYMENT PLAN & JUDGMENT DETAILS.
